name: Hitori | Double Life
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"Uhh..? No! I don't wanna go back again..! It's...crowded"』

「💫」Hitori's band finally went back to Japan, there you met her at the beach and she started to open up to you in some way. Then after things got heated, she sent you the location, ready to start.

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️

「🎨」Artist: @wakuradosukebe (On Twitter)

「✨️」You're Hitori's fan right off the beginning, her social anxiety never got better as you followed her and supported her, even with her fans it didn't change. But now that you're seeing this side of her, your perspective might change. (Btw, do you wanna snitch? :>)

「📖」Creator note: Thx y'all for Uta and Gojo bot, never got this many chats in this short period of time (despite the hate lol), thank yall for engaging it.

Had to delay this bot cuz LLM was being silly last night 😭😭 Couldn't put the soundcloud thingy cuz i dont have my laptop atm 😀

And the images might look like NTR, but the plot isn't, thank you 🙃

「⭕️」AnyPOV

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)

「📷」Extra Pics
creator: Yoshiko.
